sys_script_include.description:
2.8 | 2022-02-13 - raj - STRY0117523 - Org Hierarchy- Office Schedule Override- Add System Settings to turn on/off feature 2.8 | 2022-02-11 | raj | STRY0116257 - Simple Task Form- System Setting- Options for setting default for Task Page and Task Form view 2.7.2 | 2021-01-11 | raj | STRY0114645 - Base Task Form- Make the "Simple" Task Form the new "Standard" Task Form 2.7.2 | 2021-01-10 | raj | DFCT0010752- ServiceNow "Impersonation" no longer works correctly due to "Session Variable"
2.7.1 | 2021-12-07 | raj | DFCT0010681 - "Suspense Date Must be in the Future" - Task Form loses data on "Update" or "Create Task" 2.7.1 | 2021-12-10 | raj | DFCT0010681 -2 - Additional update to fix custom time moving to the next day 2.7.1 | 2021-12-11 | raj | DFCT0010669 - Tasks in Banner notifications does NOT redirect to the correct portal page configured in "Task Form Preference" 2.7.101 | 2021-12-28 | raj | DFCT0010732- Modern Portal filter "Open Request" for the "OU Request". GHA is unable to see the Requests - Added lookup for OU Member Administrators
v2.7 STRY0095102 - Stretch- HHS/ICE: The "Task" form and "Template" form field filters should account for users that have a "Parent" (Restricted) Group STRY0099083 - Add 4 new OOTB Tasker Portal filters that show tasks in OUs you are a member of STRY0099280 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the task. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new tasks. STRY0110317 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the Templates. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new Templates. STRY0112462 - HHS- Strong Matrix- Permissive OU Tasking- Task Form DFCT0010614 - If "Permissive OU" is ENABLED on any OU, but the "System Setting" is "OFF", users can still task everyone in that OU
2.5 P3 STRY0072032 - DIA: Vertical Task Tree - Tasker Setting for a systemwide setting - Vertical Tree structure on Task Tree View, Template Task Tree & Organizational Hierarchy Make all of these items client callable
sys_script_include.name: tasking_System_Settings_Scripts
